name: tool.os.filesystem
description: Read and write files within a workspace. A workspace is a storage abstraction (e.g. local filesystem, S3) that provides a sandboxed root directory. The workspace capability's info method is called to resolve the storage root. All paths are relative to the workspace root; path traversal outside the root is rejected.

read.description: Read the contents of a file within a workspace. Returns the text content and file size. Supports text files with configurable encoding. Example: read workspace='more0ai/workspace.default' path='config.json' to read from the default workspace.

workspace.description: Workspace capability name that defines the storage root. Example: 'more0ai/workspace.default'. The workspace info method is called to resolve the root directory.

path.description: File path relative to the workspace root. Example: 'src/app.ts' or 'data/config.json'

encoding.description: Text encoding to use. Default: 'utf-8'. Other options: 'ascii', 'base64', 'latin1'

max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes to read. Omit to read the entire file. Use to limit memory for large files. Example: 10000

path.description: Path of the file relative to workspace root

truncated.description: True if content was truncated due to max_bytes

error.description: Error message if the read failed

write.description: Write content to a file within a workspace. Creates the file and any missing parent directories if they don't exist. Supports overwrite (default) and append modes. Example: write workspace='more0ai/workspace.default' path='output/result.txt' content='Hello world'.

workspace.description: Workspace capability name that defines the storage root. Example: 'more0ai/workspace.default'. The workspace info method is called to resolve the root directory.

path.description: File path relative to the workspace root. Example: 'output/result.txt' or 'data/export.csv'

content.description: Text content to write to the file

encoding.description: Text encoding to use. Default: 'utf-8'. Other options: 'ascii', 'base64', 'latin1'

mode.description: Write mode: 'overwrite' (default) replaces the file, 'append' adds to the end

path.description: Path of the written file relative to workspace root

error.description: Error message if the write failed
